title: Senior Vice President & Chief Operating Officer
notes: Senior Vice President & Chief Operating Officer at CMT (PE, PTOE). Real decision influencer on any enterprise technology partnership. Deep technical background in traffic engineering and IT; built CMT's proprietary asset management software. Process and security focused. Supports innovation but cautious on pace. Key gatekeeper for any MS-stack or platform integration work. Board of Directors. Not yet engaged directly — supplemental intel via Roger Austin (Joel's father).

intel.source: Official CMT org chart (cmtengr.com/about) + supplemental intel via Roger Austin
key_facts: Senior Vice President & Chief Operating Officer. PE, PTOE. Board of Directors.
Deep technical background: traffic engineering early career, then IT. Built CMT's proprietary asset management software.
On board for innovation and change — deliberate on pace.
Real decision influencer alongside John Jacobs for any enterprise tech engagement.
